title: oligochaeta minima
intro: Oligochaeta minima, also known as Chinese wormwood or small wormwood, is a plant species belonging to the genus Artemisia. It has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects. The plant has been found to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, relieving headaches, and aiding in digestion, as well as exhibiting antimicrobial and antioxidant properties. Oligochaeta minima is typically prepared in herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures for medicinal use.
